channel.title: XKey Updates
channel.description: XKey - Vietnamese Input Method for macOS

item.title: Version 1.2.21 (Build 20260331)
item.description:
What's New

refactor: replace horizontal TabView with vertical sidebar in PreferencesView (macOS 12)

  • Replace TabView (10 truncated tabs) with HStack sidebar layout
  • Add PreferencesSection enum with icon, availability gating
  • Switch to auto-save pattern matching SettingsView (macOS 13+)
  • Update PreferencesWindowController to use closable window style
  • Remove unused onClose from SettingsView/SettingsWindowController
  • Fix tab indices for Macro (6) and ConvertTool (7) in AppDelegate

Xem chi tiết trên GitHub
